title: Amazon brings Luna game streaming to the Prime Video app - Engadget
summary: Amazon notes that adding games to Prime Video "makes it easier for members to go deeper into their favorite franchises." For instance, the recent Masters of the Universe movie just hit Prime Video, and now the Masters of the Universe: Legends Unite…
